PowerShell($d = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { "docker EN PATH: $\($d.Source\)"; docker --version } else { "docker NO está en PATH" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"\) { "Docker Desktop INSTALADO en Program Files" } else { "Docker Desktop NO encontrado en Program Files" })

PowerShell("--- DATABASE_URL en el entorno del shell \(si existe, pisa al .env\) ---"; if \($env:DATABASE_URL\) { "SHELL DATABASE_URL = $env:DATABASE_URL" } else { "no hay DATABASE_URL en el shell" }; "--- a nivel usuario/maquina ---"; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('DATABASE_URL','User'\); [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('DATABASE_URL','Machine'\))
PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://bex:bex@127.0.0.1:5432/bex_crm?schema=public"; npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 25)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=bex postgres:15 psql -h host.docker.internal -p 5432 -U bex -d bex_crm -c "select 'host-path OK' as result;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=bex bex-crm-db psql -U bex -d bex_crm -t -c "show password_encryption;" 2>&1)
PowerShell("--- Cliente externo -> host.docker.internal:5432 \(mismo camino que usa Prisma\) ---")
PowerShell("--- M�todo de auth configurado en el server ---")
PowerShell(docker exec bex-crm-db psql -U bex -d bex_crm -c "ALTER USER bex WITH PASSWORD 'bex';" 2>&1)
PowerShell("--- Reset expl�cito del password de bex ---")

PowerShell("--- Quién es PID 9840 ---"; Get-Process -Id 9840 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path | Format-List; "--- Todos los procesos postgres nativos ---"; Get-Process -Name postgres -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Path | Format-Table -Auto; "--- Servicios con 'sql' o 'postg' ---"; Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'postg|sql' } | Select-Object Name, Status, DisplayName | Format-Table -Auto)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -e PGPASSWORD=bex postgres:15 psql -h host.docker.internal -p 5433 -U bex -d bex_crm -c "select 'OK puerto 5433' as result;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($ready=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) en /login"; $ready=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(-not $ready\) { "Aún no responde; reviso log:"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\johang\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--2026-Claude-Projects-CSU-CRM\\e8e766a5-1a4d-492c-b2c3-8ba2e65fc606\\tasks\\b58axcule.output" -Tail 20 })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r.StatusCode\) { "GET / -> HTTP $\([int]$r.StatusCode\) $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $loc = $r.Headers["Location"]; if \($loc\) { "Location: $loc" } } else { "sin respuesta" })
